trooper.description: Critical Hits with Guns partially restore Ordnance Cooldown. On Ordnance Activation, gain Gun Damage and Action Skill Damage for a Duration. Red Text: I'm doing my part!

phlebotomist.description: While Harlowe's Action Skill is active, dealing Gun Damage to an enemy has a chance to cause a Hemorrhage, dealing [kinetic_icon][kinetic]Kinetic Status Effect Damage[/kinetic] based on Damage Dealt. Hemorrhage deals twice as much Damage to Bosses. Red Text: Be the reason someone gets a second death.

driver.description: Whenever Harlowe fires CHROMA Accelerator, she drains all but 1 of her Health and Amps CHROMA Accelerator. CHROMA Accelerator gains {0} Lifesteal.
driver.red_text: Now I am become Death, destroyer of worlds.

generator.description: Whenever Harlowe activates her Flux Generator, she decreases her remaining Action Skill Duration by {0} and gains  {1} Action Skill Power.
generator.red_text: Every lie we tell incurs a debt to the truth.

gravitar.description: Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she creates alternating [cryo_icon]Cryo Hazards and [radiation_icon]Radiation Hazards.
gravitar.red_text: This place is not a place of honor.

reactor.description: Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains a Reactor Stack. For every Stack, she gains {1} Movement Speed. When she gains {0} Stacks, she also gains {2} Gun Damage, {2} Fire Rate, {2} Reload Speed, and {2} Status Effect Damage for {3} seconds, and loses all Stacks once the Duration ends.

scientist.description: Whenever Harlowe [shock_icon]Shocks an enemy, she automatically Entangles and [radiation_icon]Irradiates that enemy. Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, [shock_icon]Electric Arcs shoot out from that enemy at other nearby enemies.
scientist.red_text: Everything is theoretically impossible, until it is done.

skeptic.description: Whenever Harlowe Slams an enemy in Stasis, she automatically fires [radiation_icon]Radiation Darts and [cryo_icon]Cryo Darts that home in on enemies. Shooting enemies with an active Status Effect restores {0} of Action Skill Cooldown.
skeptic.red_text: One must have a mind of winter.

raid1.description: Critical Hits with Guns partially restore Ordnance Cooldown. On Ordnance Activation, gain Gun Damage and Action Skill Damage for a Duration.

cowbell.description: While Harlowe's Action Skill is active, dealing Gun Damage to an enemy has a chance to cause a Hemorrhage, dealing [kinetic_icon][kinetic]Kinetic Status Effect Damage[/kinetic] based on Damage Dealt. Hemorrhage deals twice as much Damage to Bosses.
cowbell.red_text: Be the reason someone gets a second death.
